name: town-inbox
description: Town Inbox — a local-first Gmail client wrapped in a Phaser village.

scripts.portable:win: npm run prebuild && npm run build && npm run stage:backend && electron-packager . TownInbox --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --asar --prune=true --icon=build/icon.ico --extra-resource=release/backend --extra-resource=dist --ignore=^/release --ignore=^/scripts
scripts.portable:mac: npm run prebuild && npm run build && npm run stage:backend && electron-packager . TownInbox --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=release --overwrite --asar --prune=true --icon=build/icon.png --extra-resource=release/backend --extra-resource=dist --ignore=^/release --ignore=^/scripts
scripts.portable:linux: npm run prebuild && npm run build && npm run stage:backend && electron-packager . TownInbox --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --asar --prune=true --icon=build/icon.png --extra-resource=release/backend --extra-resource=dist --ignore=^/release --ignore=^/scripts
